issues.description: Blocker ability is a passive keyword, not an activated effect. Should not appear in effects[] DSL; it's a card mechanic already represented by the [Blocker] keyword itself. The OnBlock trigger with Rest action is redundant and misleading.

Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a custom trigger representing 'when a DON!! card on field is returned to DON!! deck'. 'Activated' implies a cost-based activation, but this is a passive triggered effect (no cost stated). The actual trigger is not in the standard trigger list and requires clarification or a custom event type.
Missing condition to filter for DON!! cards being returned to DON!! deck. Current DSL has no condition restricting this to DON!! cards or tracking the return-to-deck event.
